description: The perceived amount, richness, or depth of data content in the image â€” ranging from sparse/simple to dense/layered information.
likert_statement: This visualization the perceived amount, richness, or depth of data content in the image â€” ranging from sparse/simple to dense/layered information..

description: The number of discrete graphical elements (points, lines, bars, shapes, subplots) present in the image.
likert_statement: This visualization the number of discrete graphical elements (points, lines, bars, shapes, subplots) present in the image..
phrases: more charts/points/lines/shapes/elements; scattered shapes (e.g., dots, squares, pictures)

description: Spatial density, overlapping elements, layout congestion, and use (or lack) of whitespace.
likert_statement: This visualization spatial density, overlapping elements, layout congestion, and use (or lack) of whitespace..

description: The variety, type, and physical attributes of shapes, lines, and mark types used to encode data â€” including size, thickness, curvature, and regularity of forms.
likert_statement: This visualization the variety, type, and physical attributes of shapes, lines, and mark types used to encode data â€” including size, thickness, curvature, and regularity of forms..
phrases: shapes and lines; shape variation; shape size; shape increase/decrease point; random-like shapes; simple visual elements; several elements

description: Spatial layout, alignment, ordering, scale consistency, and structural organization of visual encodings.
likert_statement: This visualization spatial layout, alignment, ordering, scale consistency, and structural organization of visual encodings..
phrases: scale difference; shape position; ordered; less organized elements

description: Whether visual encodings convey clear, decodable meaning â€” including recognizability of marks, design-data correspondence, and ease of identifying data features.
likert_statement: This visualization whether visual encodings convey clear, decodable meaning â€” including recognizability of marks, design-data correspondence, and ease of identifying data features..
phrases: clear colors/shapes; understand/read shapes; shape point of interest; design-data relationship

description: Presence, clarity, and sufficiency of titles, axis labels, legends, captions, and measurement references.
likert_statement: This visualization presence, clarity, and sufficiency of titles, axis labels, legends, captions, and measurement references..

description: The quantity of text, numbers, or contextual descriptions present in the image.
likert_statement: This visualization the quantity of text, numbers, or contextual descriptions present in the image..

description: Font size, rotation, structure, spatial arrangement, and visual clarity of text elements.
likert_statement: This visualization font size, rotation, structure, spatial arrangement, and visual clarity of text elements..
phrases: word rotation/small font size; clear text arrangement/density

description: Whether the image requires specialized domain knowledge (e.g., chemistry, biology, geography) or uses unfamiliar or specialized representational conventions.
likert_statement: This visualization whether the image requires specialized domain knowledge (e.g., chemistry, biology, geography) or uses unfamiliar or specialized representational conventions..

description: Spatial dimensionality (2D vs 3D), layout organization, and the structural framework of the visualization.
likert_statement: This visualization spatial dimensionality (2D vs 3D), layout organization, and the structural framework of the visualization..

description: Use of non-representational, abstract visual forms that lack familiar real-world referents.
likert_statement: This visualization use of non-representational, abstract visual forms that lack familiar real-world referents..

description: The range, variety, and arrangement of colors used â€” including gradients, hues, saturation, color schemes â€” and whether colors are visually distinguishable and provide clear separation, contrast, and background effects.
likert_statement: This visualization the range, variety, and arrangement of colors used â€” including gradients, hues, saturation, color schemes â€” and whether colors are visually distinguishable and provide clear separation, contrast, and background effects..
phrases: color variety/shading; two colors; monochrome; bright colors; inadequate/few coloring; color contrast/clarity; distinguishable/full/highly contrast color uses; distinguishable color variety/arrangement/distribution; soft/layered/overlapping colors; blurry colors/images; white/black background / other background

description: Non-color graphical markers, textures, icons, and patterned visual elements used alongside or instead of color.
likert_statement: This visualization non-color graphical markers, textures, icons, and patterned visual elements used alongside or instead of color..

description: Whether the image feels random, messy, distracting, inconsistent, overwhelming, or lacking coherent structure.
likert_statement: This visualization whether the image feels random, messy, distracting, inconsistent, overwhelming, or lacking coherent structure..

description: Uncertainty in perceiving specific visual attributes like color and contrast, leading to aesthetic confusion.
likert_statement: This visualization uncertainty in perceiving specific visual attributes like color and contrast, leading to aesthetic confusion..

description: Overall subjective ease or difficulty of interpreting, reading, understanding, or differentiating the visualization.
likert_statement: This visualization overall subjective ease or difficulty of interpreting, reading, understanding, or differentiating the visualization..
phrases: easy/hard to interpret; more difficult to focus/follow

description: Whether the visualization conveys an unambiguous, understandable message about what the data represents.
likert_statement: This visualization whether the visualization conveys an unambiguous, understandable message about what the data represents..

description: The time, cognitive effort, or specialized knowledge needed to process and analyze the visualization.
likert_statement: This visualization the time, cognitive effort, or specialized knowledge needed to process and analyze the visualization..
phrases: take longer to interpret; read/analyze many figures/items
